Confidential—Internal Legal Memo: Emsal Renewables SE (EU issuer) — MAR/GDPR/CSRD/SFDR considerations for Q3 strategic actions.
Registered office: 21 Rue des Tilleuls, 00999 Villefaux, France; RCS Rivière B 945 120 777; EU VAT: FR00 123456789 (test key).
LEI: 5299EMSA1RENEWALX32Q; Contact: +33 9 00 00 00 00; compliance@emsal-renewables.eu.
PDMR: Ms. Tanja Marot, General Counsel, Passport (FR): XA1234567; business email: t.marot@emsal-renewables.eu.
MNPI: a binding term sheet from Nordbridge Capital S.à r.l. to acquire 51% of Emsal Solaires SAS at €18.40 per share (23% premium) of our parent listed on Bourse Rivière (regulated market) remains non-public and price-sensitive under EU MAR.
MNPI: internal production data show a 12.7% shortfall at Parc Éolien de Bellechaume due to blade retrofit delays; disclosure before interim results would likely move the market.
CSRD/SFDR: Scope 3 recalculation increases financed emissions by 9%, triggering an update to SFDR Art. 8 pre-contractual templates for Emsal Green Fund ICAV.
Insider list per MAR Art. 18 has been updated; closed period for PDMR dealings applies until publication of H1 results; add role-only entries (the DPO, the Chair) without personal data.
Cross-border transfer: HR system logs for Spanish site include trade union membership flags and biometric access hashes (GDPR Art. 9); transfer to CloudDelta Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under SCCs 2021/914 with encryption-at-rest.
Data room includes direct identifiers: sample IBAN (checksum invalid) FR76 3000 6000 0112 3456 7890 189 and BIC EMSEFRPP; remove any live employee IBANs before go-live.
Supplier onboarding includes a fictitious test TIN for sandboxing only: EU-TIN 000-000-0000; do not repurpose for actual invoicing.
Generic/bait items to ignore for PII flagging: “Field: <Name of Data Subject>”, “Hotline: 0800 123 0000 (public switchboard)”.
International transfers register to note: no reliance on Art. 49 derogations; implement TIAs and key escrow held in Luxembourg; notify the Compétent Autorité des Marchés Régionaux prior to any delayed disclosure.
Queries: route MAR matters to disclosure@emsal-renewables.eu and privacy queries to dpo@emsal-renewables.eu; physical files to Archive Room C, 2nd Floor.
